text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 7 

ADMTG_DGNS_CD 

LABEL: Initial diagnosis at time of admission 

DESCRIPTION: The diagnosis code indicating the beneficiary's initial diagnosis at the time of admission. 

SHORT NAME: AD_DGNS 

LONG NAME: ADMTG_DGNS_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 7 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field comes from the admitting diagnosis code that is present on the last claim record included in 
the stay.
